behavior_surfaces: git status command execution for workspace changed-files
state_contracts: WorkspaceService.getStatus should still return explicit error for generic git status failures.

When recursive untracked git status fails with traversal-style warnings, WorkspaceService retries with top-level untracked status and returns a degraded changed-files list instead of failing the whole panel.
Normal project repositories still use recursive untracked status first to preserve per-file untracked detail.
If the top-level untracked fallback also fails, WorkspaceService reports the fallback git command in the error message.
Recursive untracked status timeout or maxBuffer failures also trigger the top-level untracked fallback, even when child-process stdout/stderr are empty.
